VO_EN: Not anymore.
VO_VI: Khong con nua.

VO_EN: Someone at a dinner party asks what you do for a living.
VO_VI: Ai do trong bua tiec hoi ban lam nghe gi.

VO_EN: You say: doctor.
VO_VI: Ban noi: bac si.

VO_EN: They nod. They ask which hospital.
VO_VI: Ho gat dau. Hoi benh vien nao.

VO_EN: You tell them the name.
VO_VI: Ban noi ten benh vien.

VO_EN: They say: oh, that's a good one.
VO_VI: Ho noi: a, cho do tot day.

VO_EN: You nod. You don't add anything. You don't subtract anything.
VO_VI: Ban gat dau. Khong them gi. Khong bot gi.

VO_EN: You refill your glass and change the subject.
VO_VI: Ban rot them nuoc va doi de tai.

VO_EN: That's the whole answer.
VO_VI: Do la toan bo cau tra loi.

VO_EN: Stethoscope on the chest.
VO_VI: Ong nghe tren nguc.

VO_EN: Left hand steadies. Right hand listens.
VO_VI: Tay trai giu. Tay phai nghe.

VO_EN: The heartbeat is steady.
VO_VI: Nhip tim deu.

VO_EN: You write one word on the form.
VO_VI: Ban viet mot tu len form.

VO_EN: Unremarkable.
VO_VI: Binh thuong.

VO_EN: No abnormalities detected.
VO_VI: Khong co bat thuong.

VO_EN: You put on your gloves. You pick up your stethoscope.
VO_VI: Ban deo gang tay. Ban cam ong nghe.

VO_EN: You walk into the room.
VO_VI: Ban buoc vao phong.

VO_EN: You pick up the clipboard.
VO_VI: Ban cam bang kep.

VO_EN: You don't check which room you're in.
VO_VI: Ban khong kiem tra minh o phong nao.

VO_EN: The exam is the same.
VO_VI: Buoi kham giong het.

VO_EN: It was always the same.
VO_VI: No luon la vay.
